name: chatcut
description: ChatCut Codex plugin for editable video editing and creation workflows from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Edit and create videos in ChatCut from Codex
interface.longDescription: Workflow skills and MCP server configuration for routing video editing and creation work to ChatCut: importing local or attached media, creating editable projects, editing timelines, adding captions/subtitles, transcribing and cleaning talking-head videos, adding B-roll or overlays, using generation tools for image/video/voice/sound/music/shader assets, exporting, and verifying editor-visible changes.
defaultPrompt: Edit this local video in ChatCut
Add captions or subtitles to this video
Trim pauses and clean up a talking-head video
Add a simple motion graphic overlay
